CheckTitle: E2E Networks security groups do not allow inbound all-protocol traffic from any source
Description: **E2E Networks security groups** should not allow inbound **all-protocol** traffic from any source (`0.0.0.0/0`), which opens every port to the internet.
Risk: Inbound **all-protocol** rules from any source expose services to the entire internet and greatly increase the likelihood of unauthorized access.

Recommendation.Text: Replace overly permissive inbound rules with **least-privilege** rules scoped to specific ports and trusted sources.
